title: Wing Missions Taken
query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Wing = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wingCount, COUNT(*) AS total FROM MissionAccepted WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {wingCount} wing mission(s) accepted out of {total} total missions during the report period. Wing missions are shared contracts where each participating pilot receives the full credit reward independently — the same objective, paid out in full to every member of the wing.
details.help: Wing = 1 (true) on MissionAccepted indicates a wing mission. wingCount is listed first so it drives the tile title.

tagLines: Wing mission participation data logged. Coordinated contractor activity noted by the Pilots Federation.
You didn't fly those alone. Good. Wing missions pay better for a reason.
Every wing mission is a pact — you and your crew, against the galaxy, on the clock.
